issues.title: Missing filter for transaction status
issues.problem: The query does not filter transactions by status, which means it will include all transactions regardless of their status.

issues.title: Lack of comments
issues.problem: The query lacks comments explaining the purpose and logic, which could be helpful for future maintainers.
issues.fix: Add comments to explain the purpose and logic of the query.

review.corrected_sql: SELECT c.customer_name, c.email, m.merchant_name, SUM(t.amount) AS merchant_spend, COUNT(*) AS txn_count FROM dim_customer c JOIN fact_transactions t ON c.customer_id = t.customer_id JOIN dim_merchant m ON t.merchant_id = m.merchant_id WHERE c.tier = 'GOLD' AND t.status = 'COMPLETED' GROUP BY c.customer_name, c.email, m.merchant_name ORDER BY merchant_spend DESC;
review.summary: The query is mostly correct but misses a filter for transaction status and lacks comments for readability.
